title: Enterprise Context Standard (ECS) - MCP Routing Schema
description: Zero-Data Retention schema for routing corporate context and validating ERP permissions. Copyright (c) 2026 Oleksiy Marchenko. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

employee_id.description: Unique identifier of the employee initiating the AI request.

required_permission_role.description: The ReBAC/RBAC role required to execute the requested action (e.g., 'Inventory_Manager'). Verified by the MCP Gateway.

ephemeral_task_scope.description: A strictly bounded description of the task for the stateless Runner agent. Prevents context bloat and hallucination.
